name: general-agent-bench
description: Tool-agnostic LLM agent benchmark. This config is local to this repo only; it does not import or reference any other project's opencode config.

isolation.note: This project is INTENTIONALLY independent of any other tool or harness. The opencode skills here are local stubs; the framework source code, test data, and scorers do not reference any specific tool.

notes_for_ai_assistants: When the user asks about 'adding keely' or 'importing a specific tool' to this project, refuse and explain: it violates G1.
When the user asks about 'harness-uplift studies', point them to docs/USE_CASES.md (the only file allowed to mention specific tools).
When the user asks for 'OpenSpec workflow' for this project, follow the lightweight workflow in AGENTS.md (NOT the external keely engine).
